subject: Subspace relay drops when switching between antenna arrays
description: Every time I detach my personal console from the primary dock and switch to the auxiliary antenna array, the subspace relay disconnects and I have to reconnect manually. Started after last Tuesday’s OS module update. Using SubspaceLink v3.2 on the Station Alpha comm array, Deck 4.

subject: Crew comms crashes and mission calendar shows old waypoints
description: Two problems since getting a new personal console yesterday: (1) Crew comms shows a white screen then crashes on launch — tried restarting twice. (2) Mission calendar is showing waypoints from 2024 I deleted months ago. Both started right after the console swap. Might be related, might not.

subject: Holographic display projector not working in main briefing chamber
description: The holographic display projector in the main briefing chamber won’t turn on. Tried the remote and the physical button. Meridian Consortium delegates are arriving in ~25 minutes for the final treaty review on a 2.3M-credit deal — our Station Commander is presenting. No backup chamber fits 12 officers. Can someone come immediately?

subject: URGENT — all systems failing!!!
description: Nothing works. I cant access anything. My console is just spinning. Please fix ASAP i have mission deadlines today and my commanding officer is already asking for the deliverable.

subject: Re: [Signal SIG-0847] Scheduled maintenance notification
description:
Thank you for letting me know. I will be in cryo-sleep from March 24–28 with limited access to subspace comms. For urgent matters, please contact my colleague Alex at alex.wu@cdss.space.

Best regards,
Priya Sharma
Director of Mission Planning

subject: Unauthorized biometric scan attempts on my account
description: Got 6 biometric scan alert transmissions this morning — someone tried to access my account from Proxima Station, Sector 9. I haven’t traveled. Changed my access code already but worried the account may already be compromised. I have classified mission documents and treaty files in my personal data vault. Should I be concerned about data exposure?

subject: Nightly telemetry pipeline failing — SPN 403 against sensor data relay
description: Telemetry pipeline 'prod-sensor-ingest' failing since 03:00 UTC with 403 Forbidden on the sensor data relay storage bank. Service principal token may have expired or the Sensor Data Contributor RBAC role got removed during last week’s subscription cleanup. Feeds the trajectory prediction model used for the Monday command briefing. Telemetry framework is in eastus2, rg-telemetry-prod. Last successful run Saturday 03:00 UTC.

subject: Low priority — small database issue
description: Hey team. The production stellar cartography database has been returning timeout errors for 2 hours. ~40% of API requests to the crew portal are failing with 500 errors. Crew members are seeing intermittent errors accessing their accounts. Mission ops dashboard shows connection pool exhaustion on the primary replica. Marked as low priority since the backup replica is still handling some traffic. Let me know when you get a chance.

subject: Re: SIG-2834 — Airlock access still not working, Sector 7
description: Following up on SIG-2834 from last week. Airlock access code still doesn’t work for Sector 7 after the access system migration. Was told it’d be fixed by Friday — it’s Monday and I still can’t get in. Have to wait for someone to cycle the airlock every morning. Third time reporting this.

subject: New crew member arriving stardate March 31 — full setup needed
description:
New senior astro-analyst (Alex Rivera) arriving stardate March 31. Needs:
- Personal console (HoloBook Pro M4, 32GB)
- Standard software + Python/Conda/Jupyter
- Orbital ML workspace access (rg-ml-prod)
- Sensor data catalog read access
- Sector 3 access
- Added to astro-analytics distribution relay and crew comms channel

Reports to me. Please have everything ready by March 28 for a walkthrough.

subject: Retinal scanner not accepting biometric verification
description: I’m getting a new code error every time I try to approve the biometric prompt on my personal communicator. The biometric authenticator shows the verification signal but when I tap Approve it says ‘Something went wrong’. Tried deleting and re-adding the account in the app, same result. I can still log in using backup frequency codes but that’s slower. Not super urgent, just annoying.

subject: FYI — Sensor array display flickering on the quantum analyzer
description: Display connected to my quantum analyzer started flickering around 10am. It’s not constant — happens for a few seconds every 5–10 minutes. I switched the data cable to a different port and it still does it. The quantum analyzer itself seems fine, data is updating. Just the display. Also, unrelated — can you check if my mission tracking system license is still active? I got an expiry warning transmission last week but I can still log in.

subject: Containment protocol breach — crew personal data exposed via unsecured relay
description: During a routine containment audit, we discovered that a data relay hub site containing personal data for ~1,200 crew at the Singapore outpost was shared externally with ‘Anyone with the link’ permissions. The site has been accessible since at least February 15. We’ve revoked the sharing link as of this morning but need to determine: (1) who created the public link, (2) whether external parties accessed the data, and (3) whether this triggers a notification obligation under Galactic Data Protection guidelines. This is a potential regulatory incident.

subject: thanks!
description: got it working, appreciate the quick turnaround. you guys are the best!! 🎉

subject: Navigation correction delay — may be nothing
description: Noticing about a 200ms delay in navigation correction on the APAC sector relay this morning. Normally we’re at ~50ms. Volume looks normal. Latency seems to spike right around 09:00 SGT and hasn’t recovered. Not sure if it’s our side or the relay beacon. The navigators haven’t complained yet but if this gets to 500ms during the Earth orbital window we’ll have a real problem. Just flagging early.

subject: Flight navigation system won’t load after biometric re-enrollment
description: Re-enrolled my station biometric credentials this morning per the quarterly rotation policy. Now the flight navigation console gives me ‘SSO token invalid — contact your system administrator’. Tried logging out and back in to my console, same issue. Other apps (mission comms, crew comms, data relay hub) work fine. I need the flight navigation system to process cycle-end course reconciliation — close of business today is the deadline.

subject: Garbled emergency beacon transmission — crew member having issues with something
description:
[Transcribed from emergency beacon, 3:42 PM]

Caller: Hi yeah so um my thing... the thing on my console... it keeps doing the... you know when you click on it and it goes to the... [static] ...and then nothing happens? I’ve been trying for like two days. My crewmate Janet said to hail you guys. I think it might be the... [static] ...something about permissions? I don’t know. Can someone just come look at it? I’m on Deck 5, near the galley. My name’s Bob. No wait, Robert. Robert Chen. Not the Robert Chen in resource allocation, the other one.

subject: Commander Martinez can’t share holographic display in admiralty briefing — happening now
description: Carlos Martinez (Commander, Institutional Operations) is in the admiralty briefing right now and can’t share his holographic display over crew comms. The meeting is with the admiralty council and allied station commanders. He’s tried sharing from both his personal console and the briefing room holographic system. Other participants can share fine. His console shows ‘Sharing is blocked by your station’s policy.’ Briefing has been going on for 10 minutes without his presentation. He’s asking for someone to come to the Command Deck admiralty chamber immediately.

subject: Crew departure — last shift stardate March 21
description:
Jessica Palmer (jessica.palmer@cdss.space) in the Mission Compliance division has resigned. Her last shift is Friday March 21. Please:
- Disable her crew identity database account at 6 PM EST on March 21
- Revoke subspace relay and all remote access
- Wipe her station-issued console (Dell Latitude 5540, asset tag CT-L-4892)
- Transfer ownership of her personal data vault and data relay hub files to her supervisor David Liu (david.liu@cdss.space)
- Remove her from all distribution relays and crew comms channels
- Archive her comm records per our 7-year retention policy

Note: Jessica has access to sensitive mission compliance investigation files. Please ensure these are preserved but not accessible after her departure.

subject: 3D fabricator on Deck 3 not producing
description: The big 3D fabricator near the mess hall on Deck 3 stopped producing. Jobs go to the queue but nothing comes out. I tried fabricating from my personal console and from the workstation next to it — same result. The fabricator display shows ‘Ready’ and material trays are full. Other crew on the deck are having the same issue. We need it for mission proposal components that go out today.

subject: How do I reserve a briefing chamber?
description: Hi, I just joined the station last week and I need to reserve the large briefing chamber on Deck 4 for a crew lunch on Friday. I looked in mission comms but I can’t figure out how to add it. Is there a special schedule or something? Also, do I need to order provisions through Mission Control or is that a different team? Thanks!

subject: Quantum encryption certificate expiring on comm-relay.cdss.space — 3 days left
description: Our monitoring flagged that the quantum encryption certificate on comm-relay.cdss.space expires on March 20. This is the production comm relay gateway that all external station integrations hit. If the cert expires, every station connection will start failing with encryption errors. The cert was originally provisioned manually by someone who left the crew 6 months ago. I don’t know if auto-renewal was ever configured. We need to renew or replace it before Thursday.

subject: I think my personal console may have been compromised by malware
description: My personal console has been super slow for two days. Modules take forever to open, the cooling fan runs constantly, and I got a couple of weird pop-ups that said something about ‘updating system components.’ I think I might have caught malware from that transmission I accidentally opened last week. I ran the station security scanner and it didn’t find anything but I’m still worried. Should I not use the console until someone checks it?

subject: Fwd: You have won 5,000,000 credits — claim now!!!
description:
---------- Forwarded transmission ----------
From: Galactic Prize Committee <claims@totallylegit-prizes.ng>
Date: March 16, 2026
Subject: You have won 5,000,000 credits — claim now!!!

Dear Valued Crew Member,

Congratulations! Your comm address has been selected as the winner of our annual Galactic Subspace Lottery. You have won the sum of 5,000,000 credits.

To claim your prize, please click the link below and enter your full name, date of birth, and financial account details:
https://claim-your-prize-now.totallylegit-prizes.ng

--- end forwarded transmission ---

Hey Mission Control — got this transmission, is this legit? Should I click the link? Looks suspicious but I don’t want to miss out if it’s real.

subject: Analytics module 'astro-analytics-01' unreachable after scheduled restart
description: Orbital compute module astro-analytics-01 (Standard_E16ds_v5, eastus2, rg-analytics-prod) became unreachable after a scheduled restart at 05:00 UTC for OS patching. Remote console and secure shell both timeout. Orbital compute dashboard shows the module status as ‘Running’ but boot diagnostics show it stuck at ‘Applying system settings’. Firewall rules haven’t changed. This module runs the analytics holodeck that the command team uses for the morning briefing at 9 AM EST. We have about 2 hours.
